title: podman build -q does not quiet image pull log
body:
/kind bug

podman build -q still shows parts of the build log


**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. podman build -q ~/tst

2. look at output 

**Describe the results you received:**

$ ./bin/podman build --quiet ~/tst 
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob df20fa9351a1 done  
Copying config a24bb40132 done  
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
6b857695d6b6c962e94c88b01b4f8e36bcf147b3fab091add219cb7e935c39c6


**Describe the results you expected:**
$ ./bin/podman build --quiet ~/tst 
6b857695d6b6c962e94c88b01b4f8e36bcf147b3fab091add219cb7e935c39c6

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**
Output comes from containers/image
This works properly in buildah

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
podman version 2.1.0-dev
```

comments.body: @ashley-cui can you include the BZ that this is fixing either in the description or as a reply please?
@TomSweeneyRedHat uhh I dont think this is a Bugzilla, this is a podman bug that I found while working on the --log-basic BZ
OK, I thought this was part of the log-basic fix, nvm.
